title: Elemental Powers
description: This mod adds content centered around the 4 elements, Water, Fire, Earth, and Air. This mod challenges the limits of MCreator
body:
Elemental Powers is a mod that adds content centered around the 4 elements, Fire, Water, Earth, and Air, each element has a dimension, with several biomes to explore, new structures to discover, and secrets to be found. This mod also adds a few removed features from older versions such as spring green and rose colored blocks and The Swaggiest Stairs Ever.

There are 5 new ores, Flaming, Wet, Admantium, Almadine, and Abyss. This mod is no longer in beta. This is also my first mod of 2026 and my first mod with custom 3d models. Apologies if my models aren't the best, I'm more of a texture artist than a modeler.

Each staff comes with their own abilities which also grant you buffs. The Wet staff allows you to water MLG if you're falling just by right clicking a block, the Flaming Staff can place lava and shoot fireballs via right clicking. The Admantium staff can quickly get you away from danger, the Abyss Staff allows you to have more control over your fireballs as well as bend spirits. The Almadine staff weakens anything you hit with it

## New Dimensions

Water: A very wet dimension that has 7 biomes and two new structures to explore, Those biomes are

- Waterlands
- Wet Plains
- Wet Desert
- Wet Jungle
- Wet Savanna
- Wet Taiga
- Cornflower Valley

The structures are

- Wet House 
- Wet Desert Pyramid
- Wet Pool
- Wet Maze

Fire: A very hot planet around a dying orange giant star, I want to change the sun texture in this dimension to be an orange giant and make the moon a lava world, but idk how to do so without just overwriting the textures for all dimensions with an overworld sky. There are a total of 14 biomes, they are

- Blazing Forest
- Infare Plains
- Blazing Valley
- Basalt Peaks
- Volcanic Deltas
- Infared Plains
- Fire Valley
- Firey Wastes
- Golden Orange Valley
- Hot Ice Valley
- Lava Deltas
- Fiery Caverns
- Soul Caverns
- Deep Inferno

There is a structure too, it is called the Fire Altar

Skyrealm: a floating sky dimension that looks similar to the Aether, Admantium can be found here. as of v1.1.2, I officially squashed the void gap here, and as of v1.1.4, there are 3 biomes, skyrealm is still a work in progress, so the terrain gen is due to change a lot

- Skylands
- Enchanted Forest
- Golden Heights

Tropics: A very lush place. This place is the safest dimension, barely any hostile mobs spawn. There are about 10 biomes, those biomes are

- Terralands
- Valley of the Flowers
- Azalea Garden
- Mushroom Paradise
- Blackstone Peaks
- Yellow Springs
- Tropical Desert
- Tropical Caves
- Concrete Caverns
- Rainbow Caves

### But hang on, There is also one more dimension

Limbo: A very dark and desolate wasteland, unlike the other 4 dimensions, you can't build a portal to get here, to get here you need to right click an essence block which can be found near the bottom of the Tropics. This dimension is the most dangerous dimension, containing shadow walkers and dark mobs everywhere, the only way out is by finding an Abyssal block and right clicking it. There are 3 biomes

- Voidness
- Dark Forest
- Whiteness

This dimension is also good for fast travel, 1 block here = 40 in the overworld. There is also a new dungeon that can be found here

Watch this video to learn more
